programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: Some new additions, picked out by the farmers mums, lead to new romantic connections and shock departures. Farmer Dean makes a decision about his future.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Jesse is in denial when his brother arrives at Angels Memorial in bad shape after being pinned down in a warehouse collapse, and further tests reveal he has advanced congestive heart failure. Also, Willis opens up to Rox about his brother who was killed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Willis and Rox arrive at a road rage accident resulting in multiple serious injuries. Also, Elliot doubts his ability as a doctor when he’s sued for his role in the death of the SWAT officer involved in the drug bust-turned-shootout, and Leanne discovers Ariel on an ice cream “date” with Max, a young patient at the hospital.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Leanne and Jesse talk a young girl through how to use supplies on board a small plane to build a makeshift defibrillator when the pilot, who is also her mother, loses consciousness.

programme.title: Jabba's Movies
programme.desc: Jabba presents his best movies to see in Autumn featuring Michael, The Devil Wears Prada 2, The Sheep Detectives, Star Wars: The Mandalorian & Grogu, plus previews the hottest flicks coming in Winter.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre can't seem to land a good pitch now that he's moved up to general marketing at his firm and begins to doubt himself; Bow and Ruby question the new boy Diane is dating who doesn't necessarily meet her standards.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With everyone preoccupied with the new baby on the way, Erica's graduation is met with lackluster enthusiasm from Beverly and Geoff.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility among the three. Meanwhile, Dan bans Odessa from the house, causing a rift with Harris; and Mark makes extensive Thanksgiving plans that may inevitably fall apart.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Dan finally gets the entire family together for Thanksgiving dinner; mixed feelings about the Lunch Box continue to build tension in the house; Harris makes an unexpected move.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: Dr. Chris Brown Plays Midwife To A C
programme.desc: There’s no time to rest as Chris is sent straight out to help a pregnant cow through a difficult labor. And his midwife duties are not over yet.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Arson Payback for Vet Bill?!; Spay and Neuter Your Dogs!; Crime Victim's Funeral Plight
programme.desc: A man is accused of lighting his ex's mother's car on fire; an ex-friend says a custodian refuses to repay loans or take responsibility for her dog.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Former magistrate, the honourable Judy Sheindlin, presides over real family court cases, marital dissension and small claims disputes with a no-nonsense, wisecracking approach to her work.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In rural New Jersey, Gordon Ramsay visits Flamangos, where mother and daughter Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Hot Potato Café in Fishtown, Philadelphia. With no profit made in its two years of trading and an influential restaurant reviewer dubbing them `Spuddy Hell', Gordon soon realises Hot Potato may have had its chips.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Nightmares USA: Two co-owners are clashing in - a debt-laden restaurant in Brooklyn. Can Gordon fix their balance sheet? Or is this eatery dead meat?

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Can an entrepreneur with a flashy exterior find someone to settle down with.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: LaSalle is determined to prove Cade's innocence when he is named a prime suspect in a Jefferson Parish murder case involving his girlfriend, but finds that the odds are stacked against him as Cade has no recollection of the night in question.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: How Much Pain Can You Take?
programme.desc: The elusive Baitfish intentionally takes the life of someone close to the NCIS team in order to get his message across to Pride, which ultimately drives the city to search for the mysterious killer who is responsible for killing several victims.

programme.title: The Rising
programme.desc: Neve wants revenge for herself and others. Pursuing her killer, Neve allows the anger to consume her. Will she succumb to the darkness within?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In rural New Jersey, Gordon Ramsay visits Flamangos, where mother and daughter Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Hot Potato Café in Fishtown, Philadelphia. With no profit made in its two years of trading and an influential restaurant reviewer dubbing them `Spuddy Hell', Gordon soon realises Hot Potato may have had its chips.

programme.title: Ed And Karen's Recipes for Success
programme.desc: Looking for a healthy and tasty treat or something for a special occasion? Join Better Homes and Gardens' Karen and Fast Ed for amazing decadent dessert recipes.

programme.title: The Girl In The Woods
programme.desc: An alarming truth about the Bloodherd sets Carrie and Tasha in action, fighting to save their loved ones from the corrupting influence of Gehenna.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Sam Robinson explains why the body feels pain, Thomas explores the wonders of blood, and they create a fake heart.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Lindsey explores animals and numbers in unusual ways, Seb shares an international math trick, and Faye finds a five-sided plant.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Karni achieves a lifelong dream at Currumbin Beach, Billy showcases the best of Queensland fashion. Alastair heads to the hills, plus Olympian Leisel Jones shares her Great Day Out.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: At the Annual Farmer Wants A Wife Country Ball, farmers and ladies let their hair down. While connections grow, someone makes the heart-breaking decision to leave the experience.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Willis and Rox are called to the scene of a wildfire in the mountains to tend to injured firefighters. They stay to look for a missing young boy who was separated from his father.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: When the local high school step team's pyramid stunt goes wrong, Rox decides to make amends with her former step coach.

programme.title: Code Black
programme.desc: Mario joins Rox and Willis at a boat crash. Leanne works to save a brother and sister who drank boiling water. Max’s father tells Leanne to keep Ariel away from his son.

programme.title: The Greatest Aussie Caravan
programme.desc: Each week, four husband and wife teams will test their skills as they go head-to-head to see who has what it takes to design, refurbish and re-build The Greatest Aussie Caravan.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Can an entrepreneur with a flashy exterior find someone to settle down with.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie is faced with a difficult decision that brings the family and community together. Meanwhile, Becky starts working a new late-night shift at Casita Bonita, and Darlene goes to extreme measures to mend her relationship with Harris.

programme.title: Australia's Got Talent
programme.desc: In the Semi-Final, special guest Joel Creasey joins judges Shane Jacobson, Lucy Durack, Nicole Scherzinger and Manu Feildel to determine which two acts will make it to the grand final.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Under The Tuscan Sun
programme.desc: Devastated by her philandering husband, a successful woman moves to Italy, buys a villa and befriends a married man.

programme.title: Searching
programme.desc: Missing person thriller which takes place entirely on screens. John Cho stars as a widower who must track down his missing 16-year-old daughter using only her social media accounts.

programme.title: The Mentor
programme.desc: A Cronulla florist is operated by Kim, who is struggling to juggle motherhood and operate a business. Kim can identify problems with her business, but needs Mark's expertise to turn her fortunes around.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Against The Wall
programme.desc: When Abby and Lina investigate the case of a murdered stripper, they discover she was killed at a cop club house where Abby's father is a member. Meanwhile, Richie finds out about Brody and Abby.

programme.title: Against The Wall
programme.desc: Abby and Lina investigate an officer who is accused of stalking his female police psychiatrist. When the psy chiatrist is shot, their focus shifts to her ex-husband. Meanwhile, Richie's (Brandon Quinn) ethi cs and loyalties are challenged when he is newly partnered with Edie, his father's former partner and an old family friend who plays fast and loose with the law. Meanwhile, Abby is blindsided when her relationship with Danny heats up.

programme.title: Against The Wall
programme.desc: Anny and Lina investigate why there are a number of delayed 911 response complaints. Meanwhile, Kowalski family secrets are unearthed when Donnie tries out for the SWAT team.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team explores the power of magnets, from compasses to medical uses, and how they help doctors see inside the human body.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team explores a medieval catapult and builds their own, while Anthony Murfett shares plans to take Australia into space.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Weekender
programme.desc: A sea of sunflowers on a Scenic Rim drive. Canine stars put their best paws forward for a Brisbane festival. A sweet visit to Montville and Alastair gives a tropical twist to a French favourite.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: Mel gets an exclusive look at the restoration of our most historic ships, Luke visits Griffith to taste their culture, and Sally catches up with Somer to celebrate a decade of deliciousness at Anason.

programme.title: Malaysia Kitchen
programme.desc: Alvin dishes up some sticky Cantonese-style spare ribs and a unique fruit salad with a savoury sauce. Expert Malaysian chef, Carol Selva Rajah drops by the kitchen to a tasty kheema with green peas.

programme.title: Malaysia Kitchen
programme.desc: Alvin whips up a robust potato curry, serves a spicy chicken in a creamy red sauce and is visited by Malaysian food enthusiast, Jackie M, to make a sago pudding with a sugary syrup.

programme.title: Emergency Call
programme.desc: Young call taker Antionette starts her shift at ESTA 000's ambulance call centre with a desperate call from a woman whose husband has just collapsed in the front yard and is now unconscious.

programme.title: Yummy Mummies
programme.desc: Maria and Carlos indulge in a photoshoot on their 'Babymoon'. Meanwhile, the girls get down and dirty trying to get Lorinska over her breastfeeding phobia.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger In 10 Days
programme.desc: Jo, who continues to grieve over her mother's death, has diminished confidence. Zorah, who has often committed to others, wants to do something just for herself.
